commands.command: npx.cmd playwright test electron-tests/dashboard-electron.spec.js -g "drag cursor aligned" --workers=1

new_canaries.name: electron GUI keeps drag cursor aligned and prevents drag-created vertical growth
assertions: dashboard panel drag visual offset stays within 5px of the initial grab offset
panel-contained widget drag visual offset stays within 5px of the initial grab offset
document scrollHeight does not increase after dragging a panel downward
dashboard grid height does not increase after dragging a panel downward
